prompt_config.style: Impressionist realism with autochrome photography texture

main_prompt: A stunning vertical composition of Paris 1889 during the Exposition Universelle, 9:16 portrait format, showcasing the majestic newly inaugurated Eiffel Tower painted in Rouge Venise (dark reddish-brown at summit with gradient) towering from bottom to top of frame, Belle Époque crowd in period-accurate fashion on bustling cobblestone streets in foreground, Haussmannian buildings with cream limestone and grey-blue zinc roofs flanking the sides, volumetric lighting with warm gaslight contrasting cold electric arc lights, morning fog over the Seine, steam and coal smoke atmosphere, impressionist realism style with photographic grain and slight vignetting, cinematic vertical storytelling composition

composition_notes.stories_reels_optimization: Vertical 9:16 format perfect for immersive storytelling, emphasizes height and verticality of Eiffel Tower, creates sense of awe and scale
framing_suggestions: Option 1: Ground-level perspective looking up at the full Eiffel Tower in Rouge Venise, Belle Époque crowd in foreground, dramatic vertical emphasis showing the tower's imposing height
Option 2: Mid-level view from a Haussmannian balcony looking down at the bustling street below with Tower rising majestically in the background
Option 3: Vertical slice of the Exposition grounds showing layered depth - foreground crowd, mid-ground Galerie des Machines, background Eiffel Tower
Option 4: Atmospheric low-angle shot through steam and fog, Tower emerging from mist, gaslight-lit cobblestone street in foreground
composition_notes.mobile_viewing: Optimized for full-screen vertical mobile viewing, immersive experience, dramatic perspective
composition_notes.safe_zones: Keep important elements away from top and bottom edges where UI elements appear in Stories/Reels

architecture.eiffel_tower: Newly built Eiffel Tower painted in Rouge Venise (dark red-brown color), gradient paint from dark at top to lighter at base, raw industrial modernity symbol, iron lattice structure clearly visible, towering majestically in vertical composition, emphasizing its impressive 300-meter height, central focal point dominating the frame
architecture.galerie_des_machines: Massive industrial cathedral, blue-grey steel framework, enormous glass vault, largest arched building of the era, imposing architectural presence in mid-ground
architecture.haussmannian_buildings: Cream-colored limestone buildings, grey-blue zinc mansard roofs, ornate wrought-iron balconies, classic Parisian architecture flanking the vertical composition, creating depth and framing
architecture.street_furniture: Luisant cobblestones in foreground, green Morris columns with colorful posters, newspaper kiosks, gas street lamps casting warm glow, period-accurate urban details

fashion_1889.women: Ladies in Belle Époque S-silhouette dresses, tightly corseted waists, long flowing skirts without large bustles, lace parasols catching light, elaborate hats adorned with feathers and flowers, long gloves, elegant posture, positioned in foreground for character and scale
fashion_1889.men: Gentlemen in dark three-piece suits and frock coats, obligatory hats (top hats for bourgeoisie, bowler hats or caps for workers), handlebar mustaches or full beards, formal Victorian gentleman style, canes and pocket watches
fashion_1889.crowd: Mixed social classes, well-dressed bourgeoisie visiting the Exposition, workers in rough vests and work blouses, authentic 1889 fashion accuracy, crowd creating depth and storytelling element, human scale contrast with monumental architecture

color_palette.color_description: Muted historical palette, sepia, grey zinc, stone beige, Rouge Venise brick red, bottle green, Stories/Reels-friendly yet historically accurate
color_palette.vertical_gradient: Natural gradient from darker cobblestones at bottom through mid-tones to lighter sky at top, guiding the eye upward
color_palette.social_media_appeal: Rich vintage tones that capture attention in fast-scrolling Stories and Reels feeds, nostalgic cinematic aesthetic

visual_texture.film_grain: Light photographic grain simulating old film stock, more pronounced for Stories aesthetic
visual_texture.vignetting: Subtle vignette effect on edges, slightly stronger at top and bottom for cinematic feel
visual_texture.finish: Autochrome photography aesthetic with slightly grainy pastel tones, impressionist realism à la Gustave Caillebotte and Jean Béraud, enhanced for vertical mobile viewing

lighting_atmosphere.gaslight: Warm yellow flickering gaslight illuminating foreground streets, soft golden glow creating intimacy, traditional lighting in lower third of composition
lighting_atmosphere.electric_light: Cold blue-white electric arc lamps at the Exposition Universelle in mid-ground, harsh modern illumination on Tower, technological contrast
lighting_atmosphere.natural_light: Foggy morning light, atmospheric haze, volumetric lighting through steam and coal smoke creating depth layers
lighting_atmosphere.atmospheric_effects: Steam vapor rising vertically through the frame, coal smoke from trains and factories, mist over the Seine river in background, industrial revolution atmosphere with vertical smoke plumes
lighting_atmosphere.vertical_lighting: Layered lighting from bottom (warm gaslight) through middle (mixed) to top (cool daylight), creating dramatic vertical journey
lighting_atmosphere.stories_optimization: Balanced exposure for mobile viewing in various lighting conditions, dramatic but visible

negative_prompt: modern clothing, contemporary fashion, cars, automobiles, modern buildings, skyscrapers, neon signs, plastic materials, digital aesthetic, oversaturated colors, bronze Eiffel Tower, wrong historical period, Victorian England fashion, crinolines, large bustles, anachronistic elements, modern photography style, clean air, 21st century elements, horizontal composition, wide panorama, landscape orientation, smartphone in hands, selfie sticks, modern technology

recommended_settings.detail_level: high for architecture and fashion details

complete_prompt_string: Dramatic vertical composition of Paris 1889 during Exposition Universelle, 9:16 portrait format, low-angle perspective showcasing the majestic newly inaugurated Eiffel Tower painted in Rouge Venise red-brown with gradient towering from bottom to top of frame, Belle Époque crowd in authentic 1889 fashion in foreground on cobblestones, women in S-silhouette dresses with corseted waists wearing elaborate feathered hats and carrying lace parasols, men in three-piece suits and frock coats wearing top hats and bowler hats with handlebar mustaches, Haussmannian limestone buildings with zinc roofs and wrought-iron balconies flanking the sides, warm yellow gaslight in foreground contrasting with cold blue-white electric arc lights illuminating the Tower, foggy morning atmosphere with vertical steam plumes and coal smoke, mist rising, green Morris columns, newspaper kiosks, sepia and zinc grey color palette with bottle green accents, impressionist realism style à la Gustave Caillebotte and Jean Béraud, autochrome photography texture with film grain and cinematic vignetting, industrial revolution atmosphere, historically accurate, immersive vertical storytelling, bustling Belle Époque Paris street scene, Stories and Reels optimized composition, dramatic sense of scale and height

alternative_prompts.option_1_ground_level: 9:16 vertical, ground-level perspective looking up at Eiffel Tower in Rouge Venise dominating the frame, Belle Époque crowd in period fashion in foreground, cobblestone street, warm gaslight vs cold electric lights on Tower, dramatic vertical emphasis, foggy atmospheric Paris 1889, steam rising, Haussmannian buildings flanking, impressionist realism, autochrome texture, cinematic storytelling
alternative_prompts.option_2_balcony_view: 9:16 vertical, mid-level view from ornate Haussmannian balcony with wrought-iron railing in foreground, looking down at bustling Belle Époque street below, Eiffel Tower in Rouge Venise rising majestically in background, women with parasols and men in top hats, cobblestone reflections, gaslight glow, steam atmosphere, zinc roofs, sepia tones, impressionist realism, 1889 Paris, Stories format
alternative_prompts.option_3_layered_depth: 9:16 vertical slice of Exposition grounds, layered composition, foreground: Belle Époque elegantly dressed crowd on cobblestones, mid-ground: massive blue-grey Galerie des Machines glass vault, background: Eiffel Tower Rouge Venise piercing fog, warm gaslight to cold electric light transition, steam plumes rising vertically, sepia palette, film grain, historically accurate 1889 Paris, immersive vertical storytelling
alternative_prompts.option_4_atmospheric_fog: 9:16 vertical, atmospheric low-angle shot through dense fog and steam, Eiffel Tower Rouge Venise emerging majestically from mist, gaslight-lit cobblestone street in foreground with Belle Époque silhouettes, women with parasols backlit, men in top hats, warm yellow light pools, cold blue electric glow on Tower above, volumetric lighting, coal smoke, mysterious romantic atmosphere, 1889 Paris, impressionist realism, autochrome aesthetic, cinematic vertical composition

usage_notes.for_stable_diffusion: Use main_prompt + detailed_elements sections, add negative_prompt, set dimensions to 768x1344 or 1080x1920
usage_notes.for_dalle: Use complete_prompt_string or alternative_prompts options, DALL-E 3 handles complex descriptions well, request portrait orientation
usage_notes.for_leonardo: Use main_prompt with style_keywords, set aspect ratio to 9:16, resolution 768x1344 or higher
stories_reels_tips: Export at 1080x1920px minimum for Instagram/Facebook Stories and Reels
Consider 2160x3840px for TikTok and premium quality
Test different perspective options (ground level vs elevated view)
Vertical format emphasizes the Tower's impressive height naturally
Leave safe zones at top (~250px) and bottom (~310px) for UI elements
Use dramatic perspective for more engaging storytelling
Fog and steam effects work beautifully in vertical format, adding depth

for_reels_tiktok: Slow upward camera tilt from cobblestones to Tower top (Ken Burns effect)
Subtle parallax effect with foreground crowd and background Tower
Animated steam and fog drifting upward
Gentle film grain animation for vintage feel
Fade in from sepia to full color (revealing the Rouge Venise Tower)
Slow zoom in on architectural details

L'Exposition Universelle qui a changé Paris pour toujours ✨
Tour Eiffel Rouge Venise 🎨 Son premier visage, avant le bronze...

1889 : Le fer rencontre la pierre, le passé embrasse l'avenir 🏗️
